meaning: adj.相反的,逆的,<口语>执拗n.反面adv.相反地
examples: I don't find him funny at all. Quite the contrary.
Contrary to popular belief , many cats dislike milk.
Contrary to expectations , interest rates did not rise.
On the contrary, the fastest growing social media demographic from 2012 was people ages 45-54.
Contrary to stereotypes, depression is not a state that one can simply snap out of.
